name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: DeSoto, TX TitleMax Title Loans location on E Parkerville Rd offers quick title loans for vehicle owners.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans operates a standalone location on East Parkerville Road in DeSoto, TX, providing quick access to title-based lending services. This DeSoto branch serves the local community with convenient hours: Monday through Friday 10AM-7PM, Saturday 10AM-4PM (closed Sundays).

At the DeSoto location (1337 E Parkerville Rd Ste B), the team offers title loans against your vehicle, helping you unlock cash quickly when you need it. For questions about loan amounts, terms, or the application process, call 972-217-7062 directly.

If you're in the DeSoto area and need emergency cash, TitleMax Title Loans can process your request the same day. Bring your vehicle title, government-issued ID, and proof of residence to your appointment.
address: 1337 E Parkerville Rd Ste B, DeSoto, TX 75115

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee. TitleMax issues binding loan contracts secured by a vehicle title. Failure to repay may result in vehicle repossession.

pros: No credit check required — borrowers with poor or no credit history can qualify for title loans
No bank account required for car or motorcycle title loans
In-store funding in as little as 30 minutes from application to cash
Borrowers keep and drive their vehicle throughout the entire repayment period
900+ store locations across 14+ states provide broad physical access
No prepayment penalty — paying off early reduces total interest owed
24/7 online customer portal for viewing balances, due dates, and making payments
cons: APRs typically range from 100% to over 300% — far above any bank or credit union product
Monthly fees can reach 25% of the borrowed amount depending on state, making rollovers extremely costly
Vehicle repossession is a real consequence of default, risking loss of transportation
Interest rates and fee schedules are not publicly disclosed — exact terms require a formal application
Not BBB accredited; recurring complaints on BBB and ComplaintsBoard.com cite hidden fees, balances not declining, and repossession disputes
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor or no credit history who need cash urgently and own a paid-off car or motorcycle
Borrowers who need funds in under an hour and cannot qualify for traditional bank loans or credit cards
Consumers who can repay the full loan quickly to minimize high-interest accumulation
People in the 14+ states TitleMax serves who lack nearby access to credit unions or lower-cost emergency lenders
diagnosis: TitleMax is genuinely best suited for vehicle-owning consumers facing an urgent cash shortfall who have exhausted lower-cost options — its no-credit-check title loans fund in 30 minutes with no bank account required. The critical caveat is cost: APRs of 100–300% and monthly fees up to 25% of the loan amount make this a high-risk last-resort product, and any borrower who cannot repay on schedule faces potential loss of their vehicle.
services: Car title loans (up to $10,000; up to $25,000 for qualified customers in select markets)
Motorcycle title loans (secured by motorcycle title, borrower keeps the bike)
Title pawns (Georgia stores — functionally equivalent to title loans)
Unsecured personal installment loans (up to $1,500; first-time max varies by state)
No-credit-check loan approval for title loan and pawn products
In-store loan origination with funding in as little as 30 minutes
Online loan application (available in select states)
Early payoff option with no prepayment penalty
24/7 customer portal — view account balance, due dates, and payment history
Online payment processing via customer portal
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 1337 E Parkerville Rd, DeSoto, TX. Quick title loans for vehicles. Call 972-217-7062.
